title: Aurora Cannabis Inc. (ACB) Analyst Ratings, Estimates & Forecasts
text: Aurora Cannabis analyst consensus provides important forward-looking metrics for equity research and investment decisions. Analyst price targets: Average 12-month price target for Aurora Cannabis is $7.62 CAD, with high estimate of $10 CAD and low estimate of $5 CAD. Current price target is $9.25 CAD according to consensus estimates. Analyst ratings: Consensus rating for Aurora Cannabis is Hold with 8 Hold ratings and 0 Buy or Sell ratings in current month. Aurora Cannabis (US) has consensus rating of Hold. Financial outlook: Aurora Cannabis forecasted to grow earnings and revenue by 139.2% and 6.4% per annum respectively. EPS expected to grow by 87.5% per annum. However, ACB forecast to remain unprofitable over next 3 years. Catalysts: Strategic international expansion and regulatory changes in key markets could significantly boost future revenues and medical cannabis margins. Overall outlook appears cautious with analysts maintaining Hold consensus while monitoring company's international expansion strategy and market developments. Recent analyst updates and commentary focus on execution on international expansion and margin improvement trajectory.
